description: Product Description Pink Light Box with Letters and Emojis At BONNYCO , we take care of the smallest details to offer high quality products that are both fun and innovative. We currently have a wide range of light boxes in different versions to satisfy all audiences. This pink light box is ideal for decorating a girl's room, home, office, and events such as baby showers or birthdays. Just turn on the cinematic light box and slide in the letters to form your favourite phrases. Why is the BONNYCO letter board the best choice? 220 letters Includes all the letters, numbers and symbols you need to create your sentences. 110 in pink and 110 in various colours. 180 Emojis The 180 most popular and original Twitter emojis so you have a wide variety to create your messages. 2 markers and 30 transparent cards You can decorate your phrases as you like and make them more fun with these 2 markers and the 30 transparent cards . 2 envelopes to store the letters You will not lose the letters because they can be stored in 2 different envelopes that will also protect them from scratches. USB Wire 59in white USB cable makes it easy to reach a plug. Original packaging The packaging of this pink message board is cared for down to the last detail, making it perfect as a gift Original gift for girls and women Perfect as an original gift for girls and women of any age for birthdays, Christmas, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day and important events. This pink LED light box will really impress the person you’re giving it to!
